para_trans: Administrative and financial approval of the media framework to create awareness among citizens of the measures and policies being taken by the government to respond to natural and man-made disasters.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department,
the Disaster Management Division,
Government Decision No.2026 / No.56 / Disaster-1 (E-1159578)
Madame Cama Road, Mantralaya, Mumbai-400 032
Dated June 22, 2026
Reference: - 1) Department of General Administration, Government Decision No.Maoj / 2021 / Q.No. 126 / Executive -
34, D. 13th August 2021
2) General Administration Department, Government Circular No. E-10224648, D. 13.05.2026.
The Proposal:
The state of Maharashtra is a disaster-prone state and due to its geographical location, various parts of the state are affected.
We have to face different calamities. Maharashtra population, density of population,
It is the leading state in the country in terms of industrialization and urbanization. Therefore, any disaster
There is a high risk of loss of life and property. The loss of the state means the loss of the country.
The ten-point programme announced by the Hon'ble Prime Minister as well as the Sustainable Development Goals, Sedanai.
The guidelines given in the conference as well as the guidelines being issued by the central government
Reducing the severity of the disaster by taking into account, reducing the loss of life and property, and finally:
To bring down the death rate to zero and the financial loss to a minimum, the state government
Various measures have been taken. It has a competent disaster response manpower.
Preparation, provision of assistance from the State Government to the affected citizens after various calamities from time to time.
Decisions taken, however, all these decisions / measures taken are disregarded by the citizens.
A media plan is an effective tool for communicating to the elements. Alternately, the general public
What to do to raise awareness about various disasters and to counter disasters if they occur
Dissemination of disaster information to citizens for training on dos and don'ts.
There is a need to create awareness through the media.
The department has set aside Rs. Information on media plans for 43,35,30, 000 / -
and Media Planning Planning and Implementation under the Directorate General of Public Relations.
The committee 25.08.2025 has been approved in the meeting today. According to the media
Administrative and financial approval of the plan was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Different approaches to respond to natural and man-made disasters
Disasters to create awareness among the general public about the nature of schemes, policies, etc.
General of schemes and policies implemented by the government on occasion and in the aftermath of a disaster.
Directorate General of Information and Public Relations' Media Framework for Public Awareness
The Planning and Implementation Committee "approved a total of Rs. 43,45,30, 000 / - of such amount
The media framework is being approved by the administrative and financial government.
2. Media Plan Approved by Planning and Implementation Committee
It is as follows: -

para_trans: 3. The above recognition is in Reference No. 2 The prescribed standards in the Government Circular here and given by the Department of Finance.
Subject to instructions.
4. Disasters notified by the State and Central Government (Disasters occurring in the State: Cyclones,
Drought, fires, earthquakes, floods, tsunamis, hailstorms, landslides, cloudbursts, locust swarms, untimely rains, heavy rains,
Public awareness of disasters such as lightning, high seas, incessant rain, and thunderstorms)
The above means should be used only for creation.
5. The following matters shall be dealt with by the publishing house in accordance with the aforesaid media framework:
Fulfillment will be mandatory.
a) Social media, digital media, OTT, in the above-mentioned media framework chart advertisement,
Facebook, lg UN, Instagram are the owners of the content section of the ad, hence its soft copy.
Submission to this section will be mandatory.
b) Advertising that is physically done in a private or public space through banners or hoardings
It will be necessary to take a geo-tagging photo of the location of the advertisement that will come up.
c) The promotional event should be videographed. It must have a date and time
will remain.
6. The period of publication given in the administrative sanction is specified as one year.
However, the publication mentioned in the above media plan is the same as when the said Government decision was issued.
Information on the immediate action to be taken as per the availability of the relevant media from the date and
It should be done through the Directorate General of Public Relations. Publication in this media framework is the current fiscal.
The date 31.03.2027 of the year should be determined by the availability of relevant media, plus the remainder.
The publication process is 01.04.2027 followed by a consultation with the department by the Directorate General of Information and Public Relations.
It should be done.
7. Payment in respect of the aforesaid media framework issued by the Directorate General of Information and Public Relations.
The order to be made shall be submitted to this Department in the manner prescribed under the terms and conditions.
The Accounts Officer A.P.-6 is the Drawing and Disbursing Officer and the Financial Officer to provide for these payments.
The Advisor and Joint Secretary are being declared as the Controlling Officer.
8. Expenditure incurred on the purpose is demand no. C6, Heading, State Disaster (91) (2245) Response
Expenditure as per Fund Standards (01) (91) Preparedness and Capacity Building - 2245 (Compulsory) (Finance Commission) - 31 (4188)
Subsidiary Grants (Subsidies), to be distributed under this head, from the grants sanctioned in that financial year.
Come.
